title: Savory Smoky Peruvian Sea Bass Tiradito
description: A Peruvian dish featuring sea bass, Italian seasoning, and a smoky flavor, cooked in a clay pot and served as a tiradito, this recipe is a crowd-pleaser and low-carb-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the kadhai over medium heat and add the olive oil.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the Italian seasoning, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sea bass fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side until cooked through.
Remove the sea bass from the kadhai and set aside to cool.
Add the lime juice to the kadhai and stir to combine with the spices and oil.
Slice the cooked sea bass into thin pieces and place on a plate.
Drizzle the lime juice mixture over the sea bass and top with thinly sliced red onion and chopped cilantro.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
